channel.title: GitHub Dart Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Dart in GitHub

item.title: flutter/samples
item.description: A collection of Flutter examples and demos

item.title: KRTirtho/spotube
item.description: 🎧 Open source Spotify client that doesn't require Premium nor uses Electron! Available for both desktop & mobile!

item.title: ReVanced/revanced-manager
item.description: 💊 Application to use ReVanced on Android

item.title: anandnet/Harmony-Music
item.description: A cross platform App for streaming Music

item.title: xiaoyaocz/dart_simple_live
item.description: 简简单单的看直播

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: Fully open source, End to End Encrypted alternative to Google Photos and Apple Photos

item.title: chen08209/FlClash
item.description: A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

item.title: toly1994328/FlutterUnit
item.description: All Platform Flutter Experience App

item.title: firebase/flutterfire
item.description: 🔥 A collection of Firebase plugins for Flutter apps.

item.title: jameskokoska/Cashew
item.description: 💸 An app created to help users manage a budget and purchases

item.title: flutter/packages
item.description: A collection of useful packages maintained by the Flutter team

item.title: flutter/flutter
item.description: Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

item.title: guozhigq/pilipala
item.description: PiliPala 是使用Flutter开发的BiliBili第三方客户端，感谢使用。

item.title: Notsfsssf/pixez-flutter
item.description: 一个支持免代理直连及查看动图的第三方Pixiv flutter客户端

item.title: DJDoubleD/refreezer
item.description: An alternative Deezer music streaming & downloading client, based on Freezer.

item.title: abuanwar072/Flutter-Responsive-Admin-Panel-or-Dashboard
item.description: Responsive Admin Panel or Dashboard using Flutter

item.title: imaNNeo/fl_chart
item.description: FL Chart is a highly customizable Flutter chart library that supports Line Chart, Bar Chart, Pie Chart, Scatter Chart, and Radar Chart.

item.title: cake-tech/cake_wallet
item.description: The open source repository for Cake Wallet, a noncustodial multi-currency wallet, and Monero.com, a noncustodial Monero-only wallet. Need help? Check out https://guides.cakewallet.com

item.title: dart-lang/sdk
item.description: The Dart SDK, including the VM, JS and Wasm compilers, analysis, core libraries, and more.

item.title: hiddify/hiddify-app
item.description: Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

item.title: saber-notes/saber
item.description: The cross-platform open-source app built for handwriting

item.title: HemantKArya/BloomeeTunes
item.description: 🌸Bloomee is a cross-platform music app designed to bring you ad-free tunes from various sources. 🌼🎵

item.title: 3003h/Eros-FE
item.description: An e-hentai/exhentai app make on flutter
